summary: Iteration 27 - Auto-Entry Bug Fix VERIFIED. All 20 backend tests passed. CRITICAL BUG FIXED: Auto-entry OFF now correctly prevents trade execution during news fetch. Code review confirms auto_entry check at news.js lines 54-57 blocks trade execution when disabled. Auto-exit reads from DB directly (trading.js lines 175-177). Version v4.2.0 confirmed. Frontend shows correct descriptions mentioning 'AI signals' for auto-entry.
critical_code_review_comments: CRITICAL BUG FIX VERIFIED: news.js lines 54-57 now check `autoEntryEnabled = db.data.settings?.auto_trading?.auto_entry || false` before executing trades
When auto_entry is OFF: Signal is saved to db.data.signals but NOT executed - console logs 'Signal saved but NOT executed - Auto Entry is OFF'
Auto-exit reads settings from DB directly (trading.js lines 175-177): isAutoExitOn, isAutoEntryOn, isEmergencyStopped all read fresh from db.data.settings
Auto-exit re-entry blocked when: isAutoEntryOn is false OR isEmergencyStopped is true (trading.js line 224)
Settings update via POST /api/auto-settings/update properly persists auto_entry/auto_exit to db.data.settings.auto_trading
Frontend AutoTradingSettings.js shows correct description: 'Automatically execute trades from AI signals'
How it works section correctly explains: 'Auto-entry is OFF - signals are saved but trades must be executed manually'
seed_data_creation: 4 open paper trades exist - used for P&L verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auto-entry bug fix verified. With auto_entry OFF + emergency_stop OFF, fetching news does NOT create new trades. Settings are read from DB directly. All toggles (auto_entry, auto_exit, emergency_stop) work correctly and persist to backend.

auto_entry_off_blocks_trades.test: Set auto_entry:false, fetch news, verify no new trades created
auto_entry_off_blocks_trades.result: No new trades created when auto_entry is OFF

auto_entry_on_allows_trades.test: Toggle auto_entry:true and verify settings persist

auto_exit_on_processes_exits.test: With auto_exit ON, endpoint processes exit checks

auto_exit_off_skips_processing.test: With auto_exit OFF, returns 0 exits immediately

reentry_blocked_when_auto_entry_off.test: Auto-exit re-entry blocked when auto_entry is OFF

reentry_blocked_when_emergency_stop_on.test: Auto-exit re-entry blocked when emergency_stop is ON

settings_read_from_db_directly.test: Settings persist after update and read back correctly

emergency_stop_persistence.test: Emergency stop activates/deactivates and persists in settings
emergency_stop_persistence.result: emergency_stop flag correctly saved and retrieved

today_pnl_non_zero.test: Today's P&L shows values (not stuck at ₹0)
today_pnl_non_zero.result: today_pnl returned with unrealized P&L from open trades

frontend_auto_entry_description.result: 'Automatically execute trades from AI signals' confirmed
